message.content:
@startuml
actor client
participant gateway
participant "developer-service" as developer_service
database "devs-db" as devs_db
participant broker
participant "planning-service" as planning_service
database "planning-db" as planning_db

client -> gateway : POST dev
activate gateway
gateway -> developer_service : POST dev
activate developer_service
developer_service -> devs_db : persist
developer_service -> gateway : response 201
deactivate developer_service
gateway -> client : 201
deactivate gateway
developer_service -> broker : emit DevCreated Event
broker -> planning_service : consume Event
activate planning_service
planning_service -> planning_db : persist Dev
deactivate planning_service

@enduml
